reasoning: The tool provided a linear model probability of 0.46 and a seasonal probability of 0.33 based on n=1 past year. The combined estimate was 0.40. Taking the linear model's 0.46 and incorporating the high noise in 1-week equity returns, I pull the 0.40 anchor towards the base rate of 0.51-0.53, resulting in a probability of 0.45.
